scripts.generate:twilio-schemas: curl -fsSL --create-dirs -o schemas/twilio-api-v2010-openapi.json https://raw.githubusercontent.com/twilio/twilio-oai/main/spec/json/twilio_api_v2010.json && node scripts/filterTwilioSpec.mjs && mkdir -p src/generated && openapi-zod-client schemas/twilio-api-v2010-openapi.filtered.json -o src/generated/twilio-schemas.ts -t node_modules/openapi-zod-client/src/templates/schemas-only.hbs --export-schemas && node scripts/patchGeneratedSchemas.mjs
